discovery_context_policy.context_derivation: V63 discovery uses sequence plus public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; V61/V62 labels and post-seal holdout classes are not used for prediction context
reasons: RCSB public non-coordinate component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['CA']

prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: ALPHA-AMYLASE FROM BACILLUS SUBTILIS COMPLEXED WITH MALTOPENTAOSE. Entity description: ALPHA-1,4-GLUCAN-4-GLUCANOHYDROLASE. Organism: Bacillus subtilis. Polymer composition: protein/oligosaccharide. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived low-complexity tendency high; sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V63 discovery metadata context marks: cofactor_context ligand_context metal_context. Marks come from sequence and public non-coordinate RCSB metadata only; coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, and native topology are blocked before sealing.
metadata_context_reasons: RCSB public non-coordinate component list contains biological cofactor candidates: ['CA']
